---
title: "Home"
subtitle: "Interactive visual analyses of public topics"
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<style>
.analysis-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(320px, 1fr));
  gap: 20px;
  margin: 28px 0 40px;
}
.analysis-card {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  padding: 22px 22px 20px;
  background: #fff;
  border: 1px solid #dee2e6;
  border-radius: 10px;
  text-decoration: none;
  color: inherit;
  transition: transform 0.15s ease, box-shadow 0.15s ease, border-color 0.15s ease;
  min-height: 220px;
}
.analysis-card:hover {
  transform: translateY(-2px);
  box-shadow: 0 6px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.08);
  border-color: #2a6f97;
  text-decoration: none;
  color: inherit;
}
.analysis-card--placeholder {
  opacity: 0.55;
  cursor: default;
  background: #f8f9fa;
  border-style: dashed;
}
.analysis-card--placeholder:hover {
  transform: none;
  box-shadow: none;
  border-color: #dee2e6;
}
.analysis-card__badges {
  display: flex;
  gap: 6px;
  margin-bottom: 10px;
}
.analysis-card__badge {
  font-size: 0.68rem;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.06em;
  padding: 3px 8px;
  background: #2a6f97;
  color: #fff;
  border-radius: 3px;
  font-weight: 600;
}
.analysis-card__badge--ghost {
  background: transparent;
  color: #6c757d;
  border: 1px solid #ced4da;
}
.analysis-card__badge--muted { background: #adb5bd; }
.analysis-card h3 {
  margin: 0 0 10px;
  font-size: 1.25rem;
  color: #1d3557;
  font-weight: 600;
}
.analysis-card p {
  font-size: 0.95rem;
  color: #495057;
  line-height: 1.5;
  margin: 0 0 14px;
  flex: 1;
}
.analysis-card__cta {
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  color: #2a6f97;
  font-weight: 600;
  margin-top: auto;
}
.site-intro {
  max-width: 62ch;
  color: #495057;
  font-size: 1.02rem;
  line-height: 1.55;
}
.site-principles {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(220px, 1fr));
  gap: 16px;
  margin: 24px 0 40px;
}
.principle {
  padding: 14px 16px;
  background: #f8f9fa;
  border-left: 3px solid #2a6f97;
  border-radius: 3px;
}
.principle strong { color: #1d3557; display: block; margin-bottom: 2px; }
.principle span { color: #495057; font-size: 0.92rem; line-height: 1.45; }
</style>
```

::: {.site-intro}
Open-source interactive visualizations of public topics. Each analysis is
self-contained, reproducible, and built on a pure open-source stack.
:::

## Analyses {#analyses}

```{=html}
<div class="analysis-grid">

  <a class="analysis-card" href="economy/">
    <div class="analysis-card__badges">
      <span class="analysis-card__badge">Live</span>
      <span class="analysis-card__badge analysis-card__badge--ghost">2026</span>
    </div>
    <h3>US Economy 2026</h3>
    <p>Drill-down analysis of GDP, employment, inflation, interest rates, and
       financial markets across 2001–2026. Compare 2026 to the 25-year range;
       explore quarterly detail, GDP components, and economy-vs-market
       correlations by sector.</p>
    <span class="analysis-card__cta">Open analysis →</span>
  </a>

  <div class="analysis-card analysis-card--placeholder">
    <div class="analysis-card__badges">
      <span class="analysis-card__badge analysis-card__badge--muted">Planned</span>
    </div>
    <h3>More analyses</h3>
    <p>Additional analyses on other public topics will be added here over
       time. Suggestions welcome via the repository.</p>
  </div>

</div>
```

## How this site is built {#principles}

```{=html}
<div class="site-principles">
  <div class="principle"><strong>Pure open-source</strong><span>Every library is MIT, Apache 2.0, or BSD-licensed. No commercial components, no trackers, no ads.</span></div>
  <div class="principle"><strong>Data transparency</strong><span>Every analysis ships with a data dictionary, provenance notes, and attribution for every source.</span></div>
  <div class="principle"><strong>Self-contained HTML</strong><span>Every page inlines its JS/CSS — no third-party CDN, no external fetches at load time.</span></div>
  <div class="principle"><strong>Static hosting</strong><span>Served from GitHub Pages. No server, no database, no user accounts.</span></div>
</div>
```

Source: [github.com/sam-caldwell/samcaldwell.info](https://github.com/sam-caldwell/samcaldwell.info) · [License](https://github.com/sam-caldwell/samcaldwell.info/blob/main/LICENSE) (MIT)
